subject: RE: Shipment COSCO-88412 — rerouted via Singapore
body: Hi Team, due to severe port congestion at Shanghai terminal, shipment COSCO-88412 (500 units copper coil) has been rerouted via Singapore transshipment hub. New estimated arrival is 21 days from original departure. We apologize for the delay.

subject: URGENT: Order NP-7823 cancelled — quality hold
body: We regret to inform you that Invoice #NP-7823 for 2000kg polymer pellets has been cancelled due to a quality control failure at our Rotterdam facility. The batch did not pass final QC inspection. We are working on a replacement batch — estimated new dispatch in 10 business days.

subject: Updated ETA for batch DX-55 — customs delay
body: Batch DX-55 (thermal sensors, 1200 units) is currently held at Tokyo customs for additional documentation review. Updated ETA to your East Coast warehouse: 17 days (original was 12 days). Tracking: DX-55-TRACK. We expect clearance within 48 hours.

subject: Container PFPC-221 — delivery confirmed
body: Container PFPC-221 carrying mixed cargo from Busan has been delivered to Port of Los Angeles and cleared customs. All items are available for pickup at Terminal 7. Delivery confirmed ahead of schedule.

subject: Production delay — steel frames order
body: Unfortunately our Guangzhou facility experienced a power outage affecting production line 3. Your order for 300 steel frames is now delayed by approximately 5 days. New ship date is May 4 instead of April 29. Updated ETA to LA hub: 21 days from new ship date. We sincerely apologize.

subject: Shipment rerouted — Ho Chi Minh City warehouse
body: Due to unexpected demand surge, your May order components are being rerouted from our Ho Chi Minh City warehouse to our backup facility in Bangkok for assembly. This will add approximately 3 additional days to the original ETA. New estimated delivery: 14 days after dispatch.
